name: Visor of the First Ones Scholar

description.value:
This sleek silver and purple visor was created by devoted scholars of First Ones tech to aid a select few adventurers going on expeditions to learn more about the First Ones in hopes of keeping them alive so they might return with new artifacts and discoveries. You gain a +2 item bonus in First Ones Lore and can speak and understand Primacy and Trinary.

Activate—Predictive Defense 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The visor rapidly assesses a creature within 100 feet that you can see, predicting their behavior through computational probability and magical divination and then displaying the most likely behavioral outcomes on the visor's screen. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the target's attacks, spells, and other effects for 1 minute.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-24: Final Gambit: Part One
